ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-19-2022 Continued To May-17-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Patrick Larsen, via Zoom, for Jean-Paul West Lacount, Executor.

Mr. Larsen reports of a pending, related, personal injury matter and accordingly the estate is not ready to close. The court reminds counsel that it expects him to file either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration before the next calling of this matter.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to May-17-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If either of the petitions mentioned above is filed by May-10-2022, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-13-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Patrick Larsen appeared by zoom for Jean-Paul West LaCount (Petitioner).

Based on the circumstances, the Court finds that the lost will dated September 19, 1970 is admitted to probate. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. Jean-Paul West LaCount is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for April 19, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
